description: Durable file layout and status model for an orchestration run.

statusMeanings.created: Run artifacts exist, launch not yet confirmed.
statusMeanings.ready: Startup packet and route/profile preflight passed.
statusMeanings.running: At least one active lead, teammate, helper, verifier, or script job is in flight.
statusMeanings.blocked: A fixable non-founder condition blocks progress.
statusMeanings.needs_founder: Judgment, credential, payment, destructive action, required unavailable adapter, or scope decision is needed.
statusMeanings.failed: The orchestrator could not complete its own work.
statusMeanings.complete: Acceptance gates passed and closeout artifacts are written.
statusMeanings.aborted: Run intentionally stopped with evidence and reason.
statusMeanings.stale: Selected priority or route is superseded, closed, archived, or missing.

rules: tmux panes are transport, not truth.
Run status comes from ledger files.
Profile and startup packet snapshots are immutable after launch.
Supersession records are immutable run-local artifacts under supersessions/ and are replayable from run.supersession.recorded ledger events.

Run finalization may complete with non-PASS lane results only when a valid supersession record names the superseded result, resolving PASS result, authorization basis, evidence, and addressed findings.
